clauses.clause_text: Deed 5 - Deed for a Sale of Land Deed for a Sale of Land Code Number:
Negombo Land Registry (Duplicate):
Negombo Local Authority Area of the Land:
Negombo Municipal Council Grama Niladari Division:
Kudapaduwa Divisional Secretary Division:
20/01/2021 Fathima Rizwan Attorney-at-Law & Notary Public No.
N 1122/334 DEED OF TRANSFER No:
1150 TO ALL TO WHOM THESE PRESENTS SHALL COME THAT I, MICHAEL FERNANDO (holder of National Identity card No.

201, Beach Road, Negombo in the Democratic Socialist Republic of Sri Lanka (hereinafter sometimes called and referred to as the VENDOR which term or expression as herein used shall where the context so requires or admits mean and include the said MICHAEL FERNANDO his heirs, executors, administrators and assigns). -:
S E N D G R E E T I N G S:- WHEREAS the said vendor is seized and possessed of all that divided and defined allotment of land marked lot 3 depicted in plan No.
991 dated 2012.08.30 made by A.W.
Pinto, Licensed Surveyor under and by virtue of Deed of Partition No.
345 dated 10.12.2013 from the District Court of Negombo which is morefully described in the schedule hereto.
AND WHEREAS the said VENDOR has agreed with CHATHURIKA PERERA (Holder of National Identity Card No.

Joseph's Street, Negombo in the said Republic of Sri Lanka (hereinafter sometimes called and referred to as the VENDEE which term shall where the context so requires or admits mean and include the said CHATHURIKA PERERA for the absolute sale and transfer unto the said VENDEE and their heirs, executors, administrators and assignees all that divided and defined allotment of land which is morefully described in the schedule hereto for a sum of RUPEES FIFTEEN MILLION (Rs.
15,000,000/=) of lawful money of the Republic of Sri Lanka.
NOW KNOW YE AND THESE PRESENTS WITNESS that the said VENDOR in pursuance of the said Agreement and in consideration of the said sum of RUPEES FIFTEEN MILLION (Rs.

15,000,000/=) of lawful money of the said Republic of Sri Lanka well and truly paid to the VENDOR by the said Vendee (the receipt whereof the VENDOR do hereby expressly admit and acknowledge) doth hereby sell, grant, convey, assign, transfer, set over and assure unto the said VENDEE the said allotment of land morefully described in the Schedule hereto together with all and singular the rights, ways, privileges, easements advantages, servitudes and appurtenances whatsoever thereunto belonging or appertaining or usually held used occupied enjoyed therewith or reputed or known as part and parcel thereof.

TO HAVE AND TO HOLD the said allotment of land hereby sold granted conveyed and assured or expressed or intended so to be together with all the rights and appurtenances thereunto belonging unto the VENDEE absolutely and forever.

AND the said VENDOR doth hereby covenant promise and agree with the said VENDEE, that the said VENDEE shall and may at all times hereafter peaceably and quietly possess and enjoy the said allotments of land hereby sold and conveyed and receive the rents income issues and profits thereof without any interruption or disturbance by the said VENDOR or any other person or persons whomsoever lawfully claiming any right or title thereto and that the said VENDOR has good right and full power and lawful and absolute authority to transfer and convey the said allotment of land morefully described in the Schedule hereto in the manner aforesaid and that the same are free from all encumbrances whatsoever and that the said VENDOR shall and will at all times hereafter warrant and defend the title to the said allotment of land morefully described in the Schedule hereto unto the said VENDEE against any and every person or persons whomsoever.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF the said VENDOR doth hereunto and to two others from the same tenor and date as these presents set his hand at Negombo on this Twentieth (20th) day of January Two Thousand and Twenty One (2021).
THE SCHEDULE ABOVE REFERRED TO:- ALL that divided and defined allotment of land marked Lot 3 in Plan No.
991 dated 2012.08.30 made by A.W.
Pinto, Licensed Surveyor of the land called LAGOON SIDE together with everything standing thereon bearing assessment No.
110, Sea Street, situated at Negombo within the Municipal Council limits of Negombo in the Aluthkuru Korale in the District of Gampaha Western Province and which said lot 3 is bounded on the:
Anthony EAST: by the Negombo Lagoon SOUTH: by Lot 4 in the same plan WEST: by Sea Street and containing in EXTENT:
12.00) According to the Plan No.
991 aforesaid and registered under title N 1122/334 at the land registry at Negombo.

printable_summary:
==========================================================================================
Ownership & Parties Involved
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
The vendor is seized and possessed of all that divided and defined allotment of land marked Lot 3 depicted in plan No.345 dated 10.12.2013 from the District Court of Negombo (hereinafter called and referred to as the VENDOR). It states that MICHAEL FERNANDO has agreed with CHATHURIKA PERERA (NIC) for the absolute sale and transfer of RUPEES FIFTEEN MILLION (Rs. 10,110, Sea Street, Negombo within the Municipal Council limits of Negomba in the Aluthkuru Korale District of Gampaha Western Province) and that the vendor has agreed to execute the absolute purchase and transfer.

==========================================================================================
Financial & Asset Impact
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
The VENDOR in pursuance of the Agreement and in consideration of the sum of RUPEES FIFTEEN MILLION (Rs. 15,000,000/=) of lawful money of the Republic of Sri Lanka doth hereby sell, grant, convey, assign, transfer, set over and assure unto the vendor the allotment of land morefully described in the Schedule hereto together with all and singular the rights, ways, privileges, easements advantages, servitudes and appurtenances whatsoever thereunto belonging or appertaining or usually held used occupied enjoyed therewith or reputed or known as part and parcel thereof.

==========================================================================================
Conditions & Procedure
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Deed 5 – Deed for a Sale of Land (N 1122/334) by A.W. Pinto, Licensed Surveyor under and by virtue of Deed of Partition No. 2020/01/2021 Fathima Rizwan Attorney-at-Law & Notary Public No. 1150 to the presenters.

==========================================================================================
Rights, Duties & Risks
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
The VENDOR covenants peaceably and quietly possess and enjoy the allotment of land described in the Schedule hereto in the manner aforesaid and that the same are free from encumbrances and that it shall be enjoyed and enjoyed without interruption or disturbance by any person or persons. It also covenants that the VENDEE shall and may at all times hereafter warrant and defend the title to the said allotment and receive the rents income issues and profits without interruption.

results_df_equivalent.clause_text: Deed 5 - Deed for a Sale of Land Deed for a Sale of Land Code Number:
Negombo Land Registry (Duplicate):
Negombo Local Authority Area of the Land:
Negombo Municipal Council Grama Niladari Division:
Kudapaduwa Divisional Secretary Division:
20/01/2021 Fathima Rizwan Attorney-at-Law & Notary Public No.
N 1122/334 DEED OF TRANSFER No:
1150 TO ALL TO WHOM THESE PRESENTS SHALL COME THAT I, MICHAEL FERNANDO (holder of National Identity card No.

201, Beach Road, Negombo in the Democratic Socialist Republic of Sri Lanka (hereinafter sometimes called and referred to as the VENDOR which term or expression as herein used shall where the context so requires or admits mean and include the said MICHAEL FERNANDO his heirs, executors, administrators and assigns). -:
S E N D G R E E T I N G S:- WHEREAS the said vendor is seized and possessed of all that divided and defined allotment of land marked lot 3 depicted in plan No.
991 dated 2012.08.30 made by A.W.
Pinto, Licensed Surveyor under and by virtue of Deed of Partition No.
345 dated 10.12.2013 from the District Court of Negombo which is morefully described in the schedule hereto.
AND WHEREAS the said VENDOR has agreed with CHATHURIKA PERERA (Holder of National Identity Card No.

Joseph's Street, Negombo in the said Republic of Sri Lanka (hereinafter sometimes called and referred to as the VENDEE which term shall where the context so requires or admits mean and include the said CHATHURIKA PERERA for the absolute sale and transfer unto the said VENDEE and their heirs, executors, administrators and assignees all that divided and defined allotment of land which is morefully described in the schedule hereto for a sum of RUPEES FIFTEEN MILLION (Rs.
15,000,000/=) of lawful money of the Republic of Sri Lanka.
NOW KNOW YE AND THESE PRESENTS WITNESS that the said VENDOR in pursuance of the said Agreement and in consideration of the said sum of RUPEES FIFTEEN MILLION (Rs.

15,000,000/=) of lawful money of the said Republic of Sri Lanka well and truly paid to the VENDOR by the said Vendee (the receipt whereof the VENDOR do hereby expressly admit and acknowledge) doth hereby sell, grant, convey, assign, transfer, set over and assure unto the said VENDEE the said allotment of land morefully described in the Schedule hereto together with all and singular the rights, ways, privileges, easements advantages, servitudes and appurtenances whatsoever thereunto belonging or appertaining or usually held used occupied enjoyed therewith or reputed or known as part and parcel thereof.

TO HAVE AND TO HOLD the said allotment of land hereby sold granted conveyed and assured or expressed or intended so to be together with all the rights and appurtenances thereunto belonging unto the VENDEE absolutely and forever.

AND the said VENDOR doth hereby covenant promise and agree with the said VENDEE, that the said VENDEE shall and may at all times hereafter peaceably and quietly possess and enjoy the said allotments of land hereby sold and conveyed and receive the rents income issues and profits thereof without any interruption or disturbance by the said VENDOR or any other person or persons whomsoever lawfully claiming any right or title thereto and that the said VENDOR has good right and full power and lawful and absolute authority to transfer and convey the said allotment of land morefully described in the Schedule hereto in the manner aforesaid and that the same are free from all encumbrances whatsoever and that the said VENDOR shall and will at all times hereafter warrant and defend the title to the said allotment of land morefully described in the Schedule hereto unto the said VENDEE against any and every person or persons whomsoever.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF the said VENDOR doth hereunto and to two others from the same tenor and date as these presents set his hand at Negombo on this Twentieth (20th) day of January Two Thousand and Twenty One (2021).
THE SCHEDULE ABOVE REFERRED TO:- ALL that divided and defined allotment of land marked Lot 3 in Plan No.
991 dated 2012.08.30 made by A.W.
Pinto, Licensed Surveyor of the land called LAGOON SIDE together with everything standing thereon bearing assessment No.
110, Sea Street, situated at Negombo within the Municipal Council limits of Negombo in the Aluthkuru Korale in the District of Gampaha Western Province and which said lot 3 is bounded on the:
Anthony EAST: by the Negombo Lagoon SOUTH: by Lot 4 in the same plan WEST: by Sea Street and containing in EXTENT:
12.00) According to the Plan No.
991 aforesaid and registered under title N 1122/334 at the land registry at Negombo.
